Two-tone enamel buckle in stock!!️
DIOR Lady lambskin Bing dynamic dazzling bold sci-fi visual impact is stunning🤤 the entire body has a pearlescent laser effect, like a rainbow it is very stunning! paired with silver metal adds more tension, so eye-catching👍 the contrast collision of elegance and coolness, only it is unique. Once you get it you must take it out for walks😌 it is really too beautiful!!✔️
Size;20×16.5×8cm
